title: Trenčín、Trenčín Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Trenčín、Trenčín Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TrenčínはTrenčín Regionにある人口55,593の都市です。One of Slovakia’s most picturesque towns, dominated by the magnificent Trenčín Castle perched on a cliff, with a charming old town and a vibrant cultural scene.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
